2323500.name: Shattered Souls
2323500.description:
Shattered Souls is a dark, fantasy otome that is currently in development by Eternal Love Studios. Become lost in a realm where nothing is as it seems. A realm of broken, beautiful, and resilient people. Experience enchanting, passionate love stories with twists and turns in every direction. Fight for your soul, never giving up, and always trying again until the day you are healed.

Shattered Souls is the third commercial project released by Eternal Love Studios, a game studio dedicated to bringing you worlds you can escape into and romances you will never forget.



Celeste finds herself fighting for her life after enduring a betrayal that no one should experience. As she nears her final breath, she is whisked away to a different world: Remoire. Things are not as they seem, though. She’s not a mortal. Her past is as vast as the ocean. Her soul is fractured and barely holding together from the traumas she’s faced and forgotten. She must heal herself or even the tiniest tragedy could shatter her. But she’s not the only one who is broken. Join Celeste as she fights not only to save her own life, but to change the lives of those around her.

Will you traverse worlds, realms, and even time itself? Will you test your fate? Will you try again?



Lose yourself in a thrilling adventure filled with gods, demons, betrayals, and twists and turns in every direction. It’s a battle for justice. It’s a battle for your soul. It’s a battle for existence itself. Are you willing to do what it takes? Will you try again?

- Complex Branching Storylines -

Your decisions shape the way that your adventure unravels. No two routes are the same. Each route features new, uncharted locations, unique characters, links to the puzzle that is your existence, and sometimes, more questions than answers.

Your quest may be revenge, but the journeys you take to get there will be as diverse as the universe itself. Even the beginning of your story is subject to change, depending on the choices that you make.


- Seven Unlockable Routes -

Shattered Souls features seven available love interests, two of which are unlocked by exploring different choices. You will find that these men are just as shattered as you are. Will you have the strength to face the demons, literal and metaphorical?

-Personalized Choice Options -

While Shattered Souls still follows the traditional flow of choice options, you will also be given the opportunity to express your personality, likes and dislikes through the personalized choice option prompts. These choices will not affect the affection, but will allow you to answer freely in the moment.

-Detailed Lip Animations -

Shattered Souls boasts a complex and detailed coding style that matches the audio with the mouth animation. This intricate animation style creates a more dynamic playing experience.

- Content Control -

Take control over potentially uncomfortable scenarios with our ‘Content Control’ feature. This feature, when enabled, will allow you to be informed of potentially unwanted experiences and situations. It will give you the option to opt for a summary and skip to the next section of the scene.

- Multiple Endings -

Shattered Souls contains a minimum of 16 different endings. Your choices may unlock a few secrets and surprises along the way.
2323500.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
